name: io.github.nanoodlecom/nanoodle-mcp
title: nanoodle
description: Your saved nanoodle workflow graphs as MCP tools — BYOK or pay per call in Nano (x402)

packageArguments.name: --graphs
packageArguments.description: Directory of noodle-graph.json saves from the nanoodle.com editor — each file becomes one MCP tool

packageArguments.name: --out
packageArguments.description: Directory where media outputs are saved (default ./nanoodle-out)

environmentVariables.name: NANOGPT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your nano-gpt.com API key — every tool call spends from this key's balance
